exams.for_colleges: All NITs, IIITs, GFTIs and many private engineering colleges
exams.frequency: Twice a year — January and April sessions
exams.eligibility: 10+2 with PCM. Minimum 75% aggregate (65% for SC/ST/PwD).
exams.preparation_tips: Focus on NCERT books first. Practice previous year papers. Solve at least 50 problems daily. Join coaching if possible.

exams.eligibility: Must have cleared JEE Main first. Top 2.5 lakh JEE Main rank holders eligible. Maximum 2 attempts.
exams.preparation_tips: Conceptual understanding is key — JEE Advanced tests deep thinking not just formula application. Solve IIT JEE papers from last 15 years.

exams.full_name: National Eligibility cum Entrance Test Undergraduate
exams.for_colleges: All medical colleges in India including AIIMS
exams.eligibility: 10+2 with PCB. Minimum 50% in PCB (40% for OBC, 45% for PwD). Age 17+.
exams.preparation_tips: Biology is 50% of NEET. Master NCERT Biology completely. Chemistry organic reactions are important. Regular revision is must.

exams.eligibility: Any graduation with minimum 50% marks (45% for SC/ST/PwD).
exams.preparation_tips: Reading habit is key for VARC. Practice Quant from Arun Sharma. Mock tests are essential from August onwards.

exams.for_colleges: All IITs, NITs, IIITs, and Central Universities for M.Tech
exams.preparation_tips: Revise all B.Tech core subjects. Previous year GATE papers are very important. GATE also helps get PSU jobs.

exams.for_colleges: 22 National Law Universities + many private law colleges
exams.eligibility: For UG: 10+2 with min 45% (40% SC/ST). For PG: LLB with 55%.
exams.preparation_tips: Read newspapers daily for GK and legal awareness. English comprehension skills are crucial. Legal reasoning can be learned through practice.

exams.for_colleges: All Central Universities + many State Universities including Doon University, HNB Garhwal
subjects: Language Test + Domain Subject + General Test
exams.preparation_tips: Domain subject from Class 12 NCERT is key. General Test covers reasoning and GK. Language section tests comprehension skills.

exams.full_name: Uttarakhand Public Service Commission / Subordinate Service Selection Commission
exams.for_colleges: Not applicable — for government job recruitment
exams.eligibility: Varies by post. Generally graduation or above.
exams.preparation_tips: Uttarakhand General Knowledge is very important. Study Uttarakhand History, Geography, Culture, and Current Affairs specifically.
